creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 225679
Updated 0001-multimedia-plexmediaserver-Update-to-1.23.2.4656.patch

re-add LD_LIBRARY_PATH to startup env as plugins and
settings pages dont work without it.
This reverts commits:
- 5ab9d1d779ddb604cc4726f061f6ac94ace2d8aa (multimedia/plexmediaserver)
- 5742f2c5c0eb6c5871f99760fa62d63e061f16c1
  (multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass)

For more info about the LD_LIBRARY_PATH issue, see:
- https://forums.plex.tv/t/freenas-freebsd-1-23-0-4438-plugins-failing/712846/10
- https://forums.plex.tv/t/server-settings-are-unavailable-after-update-to-v1-23-1-4571/718302
